headline: Apple Cofounder Steve Wozniak Sued By Professor Over Claims Of Stealing Business Idea
summary: Steve Wozniak is being sued over claims that the Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) cofounder stole a business idea.

headline: 'SPACs Attack' Recap: Looking Back At 3 SPAC Deals, SPAC Rumors And The Latest SPAC Headlines And Earnings
summary: Last week featured three announced SPAC deals. The week also had earnings from several well-known former SPACs. Here is a look back at the week that was SPACs for deals, rumors and headline news all covered on Benzinga’s “SPACs Attack.”

headline: 'F9,' Latest From 'Fast & Furious' Franchise, Breaks International Pandemic-Era Records With $162.4M Opening
summary: “F9,” the latest from the “Fast & Furious” franchise, has opened up at the international box office with $162.4 million, Variety reports.

headline: Major Cryptocurrencies Down Significantly In Past 24 Hours
summary:
Nearly all major cryptocurrencies are down in the past 24 hours.
As of publication time, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is down 15%, according to CoinMarketCap.

Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is down 21%.

Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA) is down 26%.

headline: First Tesla Semichargers to Be Installed at FritoLay Site In California: Report
summary: The first Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) Semichargers are reportedly being installed, and it's happening at a potato chip delivery center.

headline: The Latest Picks And Pans From Barron's: AT&T, Bitcoin, Cisco Systems, Kohl's And More
summary:
The cover story in this weekend's Barron's explains why betrayed investors may want to stay with a top telecom.
	Other featured articles discuss bio oil's transition to renewable energy, what value hunters see today and the sustainable-investing landscape.

headline: Notable Insider Buys Of The Past Week: AT&T, GoodRx, Opendoor Technologies And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors, especially when markets are near all-time highs.
	A couple of chief executive officers and a president were among the insiders buying shares this past week.
	A leading telecom that just announced a major deal was among companies that saw notable insider buying.

headline: Carter Worth And Mike Khouw's Costco Options Trade
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Carter Worth said Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST) is going to pop up on earnings.

headline: Tony Zhang's NVIDIA Options Strategy
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Tony Zhang said his bullish stance on NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) wasn't particularly good on timing so he is taking one more shot.

headline: 3 Stocks That Could Bounce After Hitting 52-Week Lows Last Week
summary: Several stocks hit new 52-week lows during the trading week that ended May 20. Here is a look at three that could be candidates to bounce back up.
